description: Supabase is a backend platform that provides hosted Postgres databases, authentication, storage, edge functions, and related project-management tooling. Developers use it to build and operate application backends and data APIs.
summary: Supabase exposes a hosted Management REST API at api.supabase.com, a tenant-scoped Data REST API at <project_ref>.supabase.co/rest/v1/, a hosted OAuth-protected MCP server at mcp.supabase.com/mcp, and the supabase CLI.
